notes: The dominant cost risk is regulatory certification — ACMA/RCM compliance for a combined mains-power + WiFi RF device is non-trivial and a single failed test requiring a PCB redesign can add A$10,000–$30,000 and 3–6 months. The integrated WiFi repeater is the feature that differentiates the product but also the feature that most complicates certification, thermal management, and firmware support; removing it would halve development cost and risk if early traction stalls. With a founder budget of A$2,000–$10,000 the product cannot reach production — realistically A$60,000–$150,000 is required to reach a certifiable, retail-ready unit, meaning external funding or a staged crowdfunding (Kickstarter) approach is necessary. All figures are AI-generated estimates only — validate every line item with real quotes from a contract electronics manufacturer, a patent attorney, and an NATA-accredited test laboratory before committing capital.

ongoing_costs.note: Essential for a mains-powered consumer electronics product. Annual premium ~A$2,500–$4,000 for a small hardware startup; higher once revenue grows.

ongoing_costs.item: E-commerce hosting & platform fees (Shopify + payment processing)
ongoing_costs.note: Shopify Basic ~A$56/month plus ~2–3% transaction fees. Budget A$120/month at low volumes including domain, email, and app subscriptions.
A$500/month is a bare minimum to test paid acquisition. Realistic growth budget is A$1,500–$3,000/month. Below A$500 data is too thin to optimise.

ongoing_costs.item: Firmware / software maintenance (WiFi repeater embedded firmware updates)
ongoing_costs.note: Retainer for a part-time embedded developer or contractor to push security patches and compatibility updates for the WiFi chipset. Non-negotiable for a networked device.
Assume 2–4% return/defect rate on a complex multi-function device. A$300/month covers postage, replacement units, and admin at modest sales volumes (~50–100 units/month).

ongoing_costs.item: Storage & fulfilment (3PL or home fulfilment consumables)
ongoing_costs.note: If using a 3PL in Brisbane/Gold Coast, expect A$150–$400/month for storage plus per-unit pick/pack (~A$4–$7/order). Home fulfilment saves cash but not time.

startup_costs.item: Engineering design & electronics schematics (contract hardware engineer)
startup_costs.note: Custom PCB combining USB-A, USB-C, wireless Qi coil, and WiFi repeater chipset (e.g. MT7628) requires specialist RF and power electronics design. Remote Australian freelancers or offshore firms (Vietnam, Shenzhen) will sit at lower end.

startup_costs.item: Prototype iterations (3–5 rounds via PCB manufacturer + 3D-printed housing)
startup_costs.note: Each PCB spin from JLCPCB/PCBWay ~A$500–$2,000 plus components. Expect 3–5 iterations to resolve thermal, RF interference, and mechanical retraction issues. Housing tooling at prototype stage via SLA/FDM printing.

Provisional AU filing via a registered patent attorney ~A$3,000–$5,000. Adding PCT (international) application increases this significantly. Without IP protection the product is easily copied offshore.

startup_costs.item: Regulatory certification — ACMA/RCM (AU/NZ), WiFi (ISED/FCC if exporting)
startup_costs.note: RCM mark mandatory in Australia for mains-connected and wireless devices. WiFi/RF modules require ACMA compliance testing. Lab testing fees plus a regulatory consultant are unavoidable. Costs blow out if redesigns are needed post-testing.

A retractable-connector mechanism adds mould complexity. Single-cavity aluminium prototype tool (China) ~A$8,000–$15,000; steel production tool ~A$20,000–$40,000. This is the single largest capital commitment.

startup_costs.item: First production run (500–1,000 units MOQ, contract manufacturer)
startup_costs.note: At ~A$38 BOM + assembly per unit (Shenzhen CM), a 500-unit run is ~A$20,000–$25,000 landed. A 1,000-unit run improves unit economics but ties up more capital. Freight, import duty (5%), and GST add ~15–20% on top of ex-works price.

startup_costs.item: Packaging design & print (retail-ready box, insert, cable)
startup_costs.note: Graphic design for retail box ~A$1,500–$2,500. Print run of 500–1,000 custom boxes ~A$1,500–$3,500. Retail channel (JB Hi-Fi, Officeworks) will require professional retail-ready packaging.
